15.reason: This line uses comparison (==) instead of assignment (=). It should be m=n; to update the operator.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  This line uses comparison (==) instead of assignment (=). It should be m=n; to update the operator.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  This line uses comparison (==) instead of assignment (=). It should be m=n; to update the operator.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  这里应该是赋值 m=n; 而不是比较。写成比较导致 m 无法更新，如果读到的是加减或等号，循环不会退出，程序会继续等待输入或陷入死循环。
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  Error: comparison instead of assignment. Should be "m = n;" to update the operator for the next iteration.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 1.0 , reason:  This uses the equality comparison operator '==' instead of the assignment operator '='. It should be 'm = n;' to correctly update the current operator, otherwise it causes an infinite loop when processing consecutive '*' or '/' operations.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 1.0 , reason:  This is a comparison operator (==) instead of an assignment operator (=). It should be m = n; to update the operator for the next iteration, otherwise it causes an infinite loop when processing consecutive * or / operators.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [This line uses '==' (comparison) instead of '=' (assignment), so m is never updated to n, causing infinite loop or incorrect parsing]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [This is a comparison (==) instead of assignment (=). It should be m = n; to update the operator for the next iteration.]
